title: 📲 App
lead: Contacts made through the APP, using the available forms for communication with the company, also generate automatic tickets in Salesforce.

auto.title: Automatic Case
auto.text: When submitting a request through the APP, a case is automatically created in the system.

step1.title: App Submission
step1.text: The customer fills out the form in the app and submits their request.

step2.title: SAC Screening
step2.text: The ticket is forwarded to SAC Screening.

triagem.title: SAC Screening performs:
triagem.item2: Forwarding to the responsible area, when applicable
triagem.item3: Response to customers in cases handled directly by SAC

highlight.title: Benefit
highlight.text: This channel facilitates customer contact and ensures structured tracking of all requests.

q1.text: True or False: The App service flow is similar to the Website, with automatic case creation.
q1.feedback: Correct! Both the App and Website generate automatic tickets in Salesforce and go through SAC Screening.
